name: Horned Dragon Breath Potion
description: This liquid contains blood from a juvenile green dragon. For 1 hour after you drink the potion, you can breathe out a magical cloud of poison. Exhaling this dragon breath uses a single action. The cloud of poison deals |options:area-damage] damage in a , and each creature in the area must attempt a save. After you use the dragon breath, you can't do so again for [[/r 1d4 #rounds]]{1d4 rounds}.
